zh.Weston Underwood, Buckinghamshire, Engla: 英國巴金哈姆爾韋斯頓 安德伍德
zh.Tachbrook Mallory, Warwickshire, England: 英國英格蘭瓦維其可爾塔賀布盧可 馬洛里
zh.Warwickshire, England: 英國英格蘭瓦維其可爾
zh.lifeSummary: 當Lord John de  Olney III於1354年出生在英國英格蘭瓦維其可爾塔賀布盧可 馬洛里時，他的父親John Barker de Olney34歲，母親Dionysis Abberbury28歲。他於大約1387年與Lady Margaret Margery 17th D'Olney在英國英格蘭瓦維其可爾結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1419年在英國巴金哈姆爾韋斯頓 安德伍德享年65歲，埋葬在英國。

zh-hans.Weston Underwood, Buckinghamshire, Engla: 英国巴金哈姆爾韋斯頓 安德伍德

zh-hans.Warwickshire, England: 英国英格兰瓦維其可爾
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lord John de  Olney III于1354年出生在英国英格兰瓦維其可爾塔賀布盧可 馬洛里时，他的父亲John Barker de Olney34岁，母亲Dionysis Abberbury28岁。他于大约1387年与Lady Margaret Margery 17th D'Olney在英国英格兰瓦維其可爾结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1419年在英国巴金哈姆爾韋斯頓 安德伍德享年65岁，埋葬在英国。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Olney
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Olney in Buckinghamshire. The placename derives from an Old English personal name Olla + Old English ēg ‘island’.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Lord John de  Olney III was born in 1354, in Tachbrook Mallory, Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, John Barker de Olney, was 34 and his mother, Dionysis Abberbury, was 28. He married Lady Margaret Margery 17th D'Olney about 1387, in Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. He died in 1419, in Weston Underwood, Buckinghamshire, England, at the age of 65, and was buried in England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lord John de  Olney III est né en 1354, à Tachbrook Mallory, Warwickshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, John Barker de Olney, avait 34 ans et sa mère, Dionysis Abberbury, avait 28 ans. Il a épousé Lady Margaret Margery 17th D'Olney environ 1387, à Warwickshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1419, à Weston Underwood, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 65 ans, et a été enterré à Angleterre.

de.Tachbrook Mallory, Warwickshire, England: Tachbrook Mallory, Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Lord John de  Olney III 1354 in Tachbrook Mallory, Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Barker de Olney 34 und seine Mutter Dionysis Abberbury 28. Er hat um 1387 in Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom Lady Margaret Margery 17th D'Olney geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Er starb 1419 im Alter von 65 Jahren in Weston Underwood, Buckinghamshire, England und wurde in England begraben.

it.Tachbrook Mallory, Warwickshire, England: Tachbrook Mallory, Warwickshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito
it.lifeSummary: Quando Lord John de  Olney III è nato il nel 1354 nel Tachbrook Mallory, Warwickshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, John Barker de Olney, aveva 34 anni e il suo madre, Dionysis Abberbury, aveva 28 anni. Lui sposato Lady Margaret Margery 17th D'Olney circa 1387, nel Warwickshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1419, nel Weston Underwood, Buckinghamshire, England, all'età di 65 anni, e fu sepolto a England.

ja.lifeSummary: Lord John de  Olney IIIが1354年にイギリスイギリスワーウィクシュアイアタチブルーク マロリーで生まれた時，父John Barker de Olneyは34歳，母Dionysis Abberburyは28歳であった。約1387年にイギリスイギリスワーウィクシュアイアでLady Margaret Margery 17th D'Olneyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1419年にイギリスブクインガムシュアイアウエストン ウンデルウッドで65歳で死去し，イギリスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Lord John de  Olney III(이)가 1354년 영국 잉글랜드 워윅실르 타ch브룩 맬로리에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Barker de Olney(은)는 34세였고, 그의 어머니 Dionysis Abberbury(은)는 28세였다. 그는 대략 1387년 영국 잉글랜드 워윅실르에서 Lady Margaret Margery 17th D'Olney(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1419년 영국 벅잉함실르 웨스턴 운더우드에서 65세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국에 묻혔다.

pt.Tachbrook Mallory, Warwickshire, England: Tachbrook Mallory, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lord John de  Olney III nasceu em 1354, em Tachbrook Mallory, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, John Barker de Olney, tinha 34 anos e sua mãe, Dionysis Abberbury, tinha 28 anos. Ele casou-se com Lady Margaret Margery 17th D'Olney aproximadamente 1387, em Warwickshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 1419, em Weston Underwood, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, com 65 anos, e foi sepultado em Inglaterra.

ro.Tachbrook Mallory, Warwickshire, England: Tachbrook Mallory, Warwickshire, Anglia, United Kingdom

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lord John de  Olney III родился в 1354 г. в местности тачбрук маллори, варвиккшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени John Barker de Olney было 34 года, а матери, которую звали Dionysis Abberbury, 28. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Margaret Margery 17th D'Olney около 1387 г. в местности варвиккшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Он умер в 1419 г. в местности вестон ундирвуд, буккингхамшир, Англия в возрасте 65 лет и был похоронен в местности Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lord John de  Olney III nació en 1354, en Tachbrook Mallory, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, John Barker de Olney, tenía 34 años y su mamá, Dionysis Abberbury, tenía 28 años. Se casó con Lady Margaret Margery 17th D'Olney aproximadamente 1387, en Warwickshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Murió en 1419, en Weston Underwood, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 65 años, y fue sepultado en Inglaterra.
